title: INHERIT v1 Dialect
description: Custom metaschema for the INHERIT v1 schema suite. Extends JSON Schema 2020-12. Format keywords are intended to be validated — see $comment for tooling compatibility notes.
$comment: INHERIT intends format keywords (uuid, email, date-time, uri) to be validated, not just annotated. The format-assertion vocabulary is not yet supported by all tooling (including the Sourcemeta CLI), so we declare format-annotation here for compatibility. AJV enforces format validation via validateFormats: true. When tooling catches up, switch to format-assertion.
